papers_found.title: Continued fractions, Cantor sets, Hausdorff dimension, and transfer operators
Computing the dimension of dynamically defined sets
papers_found.notes: Methods we use to compute dim_H

papers_found.title: Rigorous effective bounds on Hausdorff dimension of E_2
papers_found.notes: 100-digit computation of dim_H(E_2), validates our method

assessment: Hausdorff dimension computation methods are well-established (Hensley, Jenkinson-Pollicott). Our complete spectrum of all 2^20-1 subsets is novel. Digit 1 dominance is a new computational observation.
